data.body: EPIC 2141 CLAIMED (in_progress, assignee joe) with fresh valid attestation. Remediated story A plan (added ## Dependencies pinning landed audit_trail contract + self-enumeration note; corrected CLI section to 'add serve to existing audit_cli intercept + update help/audit.txt'; corrected config.py explicit re-export; added --port flag + AC and strengthened AC2 refusal-message). Launched story A re-review (bg b6tvgcaag) and fresh story F review (bg b6th49u7g), both --force. Awaiting verdicts before claiming/implementing. Reliable bg mechanism = harness run_in_background (nohup& got killed earlier).
